title: IMF International Financial Statistics (IFS) — selected historical monthly issues, freely downloadable from IMF eLibrary's 'Archived Series'

files.name: ifs_1969-12.pdf
files.notes: Internal PDF metadata Title field shows a mismatched filename (9781513533896.pdf) and Producer=ABBYY FineReader 12 (OCR'd scan, unlike the iText-generated typeset PDFs used for other issues) - confirmed via full-text search this file genuinely contains 'DECEMBER 1969 Volume XXII Number 12'. Much larger file size (246MB) than neighboring issues, consistent with being an image-based OCR scan rather than a born-digital typeset PDF.

files.name: ifs_1974-03.pdf
files.notes: NOT a regular monthly issue - confirmed via full-text read this is a short 'New and Revised Data' supplement covering only Cyprus, Kuwait, Peru, Rwanda, Saudi Arabia, plus a general Par Values table. Iran does NOT appear in it; not usable for Iran extraction.

time_coverage: 1948-1972, one representative issue per available year (target years 1949-1979; confirmed real gaps in the free archive at 1951-1955, 1957, 1959, 1961, 1963, 1967, 1971 is WRONG - see notes; actual confirmed-empty years: 1951,1952,1953,1954,1955,1957,1959,1961,1963,1967,1971,1973,1975,1976,1977,1978,1979)
frequency: monthly (issue-level); one hand-picked issue per available year, prioritizing December
units: described per table inside each PDF (mostly national currency millions/billions or index numbers, IMF's own standardized presentation)
license_terms: IMF eLibrary © International Monetary Fund; this 'Archived Series' subject collection (subject/041) is offered with a public 'Download PDF' button with no login/paywall encountered — verified via curl (no auth cookies required, HTTP 200, correct Content-Type: application/pdf). Users should still consult IMF's own copyright/usage policy (https://www.elibrary.imf.org copyright page) before redistribution.
notes: Systematic pull session (agent:imf-ifs-systematic-pull) added 11 issues to the original 4-file sample: 1949-12, 1950-12, 1956-12, 1958-12, 1960-12, 1964-12, 1965-11, 1968-12, 1969-12, 1970-12, 1972-12. Discovered the per-year query pattern https://www.elibrary.imf.org/subject/041?fromDate=YYYY&toDate=YYYY (returns a 'noresults=true' marker in the response HTML when a year genuinely has no archived issue, distinguishing real gaps from parsing errors). Queried every year 1949-1979 individually. Years WITH free-archive issues: 1948,1949,1950,1956,1958,1960,1962,1964,1965,1966,1968,1969,1970,1972,1974(supplement only, no Iran). Years CONFIRMED EMPTY (no issues at all in the free archive): 1951,1952,1953,1954,1955,1957,1959,1961,1963,1967,1971,1973,1975,1976,1977,1978,1979 — i.e. free coverage stops dead after 1972 until (unverified) some later resumption point; within 1949-1972 it alternates in multi-year clusters. Iran's country-page format/layout changed repeatedly across this span (pre-1956: big cross-country tables; 1956-1962: 'Iran' + 'Iran (Continued)' two-page annual spread with numbered lines 1-90; 1964 onward: 'International Liquidity/Central Bank/Monetary Survey' labeled two-to-three-page spreads with quarterly+monthly detail, line codes renumbered almost every issue but cross-validated via chart legends and value continuity across overlapping years — see extraction log for full methodology and two caught-and-corrected transcription errors).
failures: IMF eLibrary subject/041 date-filter fromDate=YYYY&toDate=YYYY -> confirmed 'noresults=true' (no issue) for: 1951,1952,1953,1954,1955,1957,1959,1961,1963,1967,1971,1973,1975,1976,1977,1978,1979
ifs_1974-03.pdf downloaded but contains no Iran data (special supplement issue, not a regular monthly)
